emails.subject: Interested in your work
emails.body: Hi Shaurya, I came across your portfolio and I'm really impressed with your work. I'd love to connect and discuss a potential collaboration opportunity.

emails.subject: Open Source Contribution
emails.body: Hello! I noticed your CitySaver microgrid project and would like to contribute. I have experience with reinforcement learning and would love to help.

emails.subject: Internship Opportunity
emails.body: We're looking for an AI/ML intern with your skillset. Please find the role description attached. Flexible remote work available.
